label: EU jurisdiction only
description: Deploy only on nodes in EU member states (GDPR / PSD2 compliance)

label: NATO countries only
description: Restrict to nodes in NATO member countries

label: GPU required
description: Only schedule on nodes that have at least one GPU

label: NVMe storage
description: Require at least one NVMe drive — low latency for databases and checkpoints

label: High bandwidth (>1 Gbps)
description: Nodes with network capacity above 1 Gbps

label: ≥99% uptime
description: Only operators with a 30-day rolling uptime of 99% or above

label: Top reputation (≥0.90)
description: Composite reputation score ≥0.90 — combines uptime and success rate

label: x86-64 architecture
description: Pin to x86-64 nodes — required for templates without ARM builds

label: ARM64 architecture
description: Pin to ARM64 nodes — lower cost for compatible workloads
